creator: toyonaga@msd.ts.fujitsu.co.jp
text:
mule  and its family in ports collection fails to build because it presumes
crt0.o and libgcc.a in /usr/lib. These files are in /usr/lib/(aout|elf) in current -current.

Fix: 

Change 2 lines of work/src/Makefile (or Makefile.in before running configure)
which hardcodes library position /usr/lib to /usr/lib/aout when built by
current -current(I don't know from when)
How-To-Repeat: 
1. remove old libraries from /usr/lib;
2. cd /usr/ports/japanese/mule-anything
3. make
